mapper.sql: f.is_deleted = 0 AND COALESCE(f.is_spare, 0) = 0 AND COALESCE(f.roll_no_status, 1) != 3 AND COALESCE(f.finish_status, 0) != 4 AND ( NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM biz_process_stage_output sfo WHERE sfo.finish_roll_uuid = f.uuid AND sfo.is_deleted = 0 ) OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM biz_process_stage_output sff WHERE sff.finish_roll_uuid = f.uuid AND sff.is_deleted = 0 AND sff.output_type = 2 AND sff.output_status = 3 ) )

SELECT sd.order_uuid, SUM(CASE WHEN st.settleTotal > 0 THEN COALESCE( so.total_amount, CAST(JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(so.snap_bill, '$.total_amount')) AS DECIMAL(18, 2)), CAST(JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(so.snap_bill, '$.totalAmount')) AS DECIMAL(18, 2)), st.settleTotal, 0 ) * COALESCE(sd.order_amount, 0) / st.settleTotal ELSE 0 END) AS billedAmount, SUM(CASE WHEN st.settleTotal > 0 THEN COALESCE(rr.receivedAmount, 0) * COALESCE(sd.order_amount, 0) / st.settleTotal ELSE 0 END) AS receivedAmount, SUM(CASE WHEN st.settleTotal > 0 THEN COALESCE(rr.cashReceivedAmount, 0) * COALESCE(sd.order_amount, 0) / st.settleTotal ELSE 0 END) AS cashReceivedAmount, SUM(CASE WHEN st.settleTotal > 0 THEN COALESCE(rr.scrapOffsetAmount, 0) * COALESCE(sd.order_amount, 0) / st.settleTotal ELSE 0 END) AS scrapOffsetAmount FROM biz_settle_detail sd JOIN biz_settle_order so ON so.uuid = sd.settle_uuid AND so.is_deleted = 0 AND COALESCE(so.settle_status, 1) IN (1, 2, 3) JOIN ( SELECT settle_uuid, SUM(COALESCE(order_amount, 0)) AS settleTotal FROM biz_settle_detail WHERE is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY settle_uuid ) st ON st.settle_uuid = sd.settle_uuid LEFT JOIN ( SELECT settle_uuid, SUM(COALESCE(receive_amount, 0)) AS receivedAmount, SUM(CASE WHEN cash_amount IS NULL AND COALESCE(scrap_offset_amount, 0) = 0 THEN COALESCE(receive_amount, 0) ELSE COALESCE(cash_amount, 0) END) AS cashReceivedAmount, SUM(COALESCE(scrap_offset_amount, 0)) AS scrapOffsetAmount FROM biz_receive_record WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND COALESCE(record_status, 1) = 1 GROUP BY settle_uuid ) rr ON rr.settle_uuid = sd.settle_uuid WHERE sd.is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY sd.order_uuid

LEFT JOIN ( SELECT rb.order_uuid, SUM(rb.rollProcessAmount) AS scopedProcessAmount, SUM(rb.rollAmountBase) AS scopedAmountBase, MAX(rb.orderAmountBase) AS orderAmountBase FROM ( SELECT r.order_uuid, COALESCE(r.process_amount, 0) AS rollProcessAmount, CASE WHEN COALESCE(orderBase.orderProcessAmount, 0) > 0 THEN COALESCE(r.process_amount, 0) WHEN COALESCE(orderBase.orderOriginalWeight, 0) > 0 THEN COALESCE(r.actual_weight, r.total_weight, r.roll_weight, 0) WHEN COALESCE(orderBase.orderRollCount, 0) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS rollAmountBase, CASE WHEN COALESCE(orderBase.orderProcessAmount, 0) > 0 THEN COALESCE(orderBase.orderProcessAmount, 0) WHEN COALESCE(orderBase.orderOriginalWeight, 0) > 0 THEN COALESCE(orderBase.orderOriginalWeight, 0) ELSE COALESCE(orderBase.orderRollCount, 0) END AS orderAmountBase FROM biz_original_roll r LEFT JOIN ( SELECT order_uuid, COUNT(*) AS orderRollCount, SUM(COALESCE(actual_weight, total_weight, roll_weight, 0)) AS orderOriginalWeight, SUM(COALESCE(process_amount, 0)) AS orderProcessAmount FROM biz_original_roll WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND COALESCE(process_mode, 0) != 3 GROUP BY order_uuid ) orderBase ON orderBase.order_uuid = r.order_uuid WHERE r.is_deleted = 0 AND COALESCE(r.process_mode, 0) != 3
) rb GROUP BY rb.order_uuid ) amountScope ON amountScope.order_uuid = o.uuid
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(o.uuid) AS orderCount, COALESCE(SUM(orig.originalRollCount), 0) AS originalRollCount, COALESCE(SUM(fin.finishRollCount), 0) AS finishRollCount, COALESCE(SUM(orig.originalWeight), 0) AS originalWeight, COALESCE(SUM(fin.finishWeight), 0) AS finishWeight, COALESCE(SUM(orig.lossWeight), 0) AS lossWeight, CASE WHEN COALESCE(SUM(orig.originalWeight), 0) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE COALESCE(SUM(orig.lossWeight), 0) / COALESCE(SUM(orig.originalWeight), 0) * 100 END AS lossRatio, COALESCE(SUM(step.knifeCount), 0) AS knifeCount, COALESCE(SUM(step.sawAmount), 0) AS sawAmount, COALESCE(SUM(step.rewindAmount), 0) AS rewindAmount,
COALESCE(SUM(amountScope.scopedProcessAmount), 0) AS processAmount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN amountScope.orderAmountBase > 0 THEN COALESCE(o.total_extra_amount, 0) * amountScope.scopedAmountBase / amountScope.orderAmountBase ELSE 0 END), 0) AS extraAmount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN amountScope.orderAmountBase > 0 THEN COALESCE(settle.billedAmount, o.total_amount, 0) * amountScope.scopedAmountBase / amountScope.orderAmountBase ELSE 0 END), 0) AS totalAmount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN amountScope.orderAmountBase > 0 THEN COALESCE(settle.billedAmount, 0) * amountScope.scopedAmountBase / amountScope.orderAmountBase ELSE 0 END), 0) AS settled_amount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN settle.order_uuid IS NULL AND amountScope.orderAmountBase > 0 THEN COALESCE(o.total_amount, 0) * amountScope.scopedAmountBase / amountScope.orderAmountBase ELSE 0 END), 0) AS pending_settle_amount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN amountScope.orderAmountBase > 0 THEN COALESCE(settle.receivedAmount, 0) * amountScope.scopedAmountBase / amountScope.orderAmountBase ELSE 0 END), 0) AS receivedAmount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN amountScope.orderAmountBase > 0 THEN COALESCE(settle.cashReceivedAmount, 0) * amountScope.scopedAmountBase / amountScope.orderAmountBase ELSE 0 END), 0) AS cashReceivedAmount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN amountScope.orderAmountBase > 0 THEN COALESCE(settle.scrapOffsetAmount, 0) * amountScope.scopedAmountBase / amountScope.orderAmountBase ELSE 0 END), 0) AS scrapOffsetAmount, COALESCE(SUM(GREATEST( CASE WHEN amountScope.orderAmountBase > 0 THEN COALESCE(settle.billedAmount, 0) * amountScope.scopedAmountBase / amountScope.orderAmountBase ELSE 0 END - CASE WHEN amountScope.orderAmountBase > 0 THEN COALESCE(settle.receivedAmount, 0) * amountScope.scopedAmountBase / amountScope.orderAmountBase ELSE 0 END, 0)), 0) AS unreceivedAmount
COALESCE(SUM(o.total_process_amount), 0) AS processAmount, COALESCE(SUM(o.total_extra_amount), 0) AS extraAmount, COALESCE(SUM(COALESCE(settle.billedAmount, o.total_amount, 0)), 0) AS totalAmount, COALESCE(SUM(settle.billedAmount), 0) AS settled_amount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN settle.order_uuid IS NULL THEN COALESCE(o.total_amount, 0) ELSE 0 END), 0) AS pending_settle_amount, COALESCE(SUM(settle.receivedAmount), 0) AS receivedAmount, COALESCE(SUM(settle.cashReceivedAmount), 0) AS cashReceivedAmount, COALESCE(SUM(settle.scrapOffsetAmount), 0) AS scrapOffsetAmount, COALESCE(SUM(GREATEST(COALESCE(settle.billedAmount, 0) - COALESCE(settle.receivedAmount, 0), 0)), 0) AS unreceivedAmount
FROM biz_process_order o LEFT JOIN ( SELECT r.order_uuid, COUNT(*) AS originalRollCount, SUM(COALESCE(r.actual_weight, r.total_weight, r.roll_weight, 0)) AS originalWeight, SUM(COALESCE(r.total_loss_weight, 0)) AS lossWeight FROM biz_original_roll r WHERE r.is_deleted = 0 AND COALESCE(r.process_mode, 0) != 3
GROUP BY r.order_uuid ) orig ON orig.order_uuid = o.uuid LEFT JOIN ( SELECT f.order_uuid, COUNT(*) AS finishRollCount, SUM(COALESCE(f.actual_weight, f.estimate_weight, 0)) AS finishWeight FROM biz_finish_roll f WHERE
AND f.paper_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{q.paperName}, '%')
GROUP BY f.order_uuid ) fin ON fin.order_uuid = o.uuid LEFT JOIN ( SELECT ps.order_uuid, SUM(COALESCE(ps.knife_count, 0)) AS knifeCount, SUM(CASE WHEN ps.step_type = 1 THEN COALESCE(ps.step_amount, 0) ELSE 0 END) AS sawAmount, SUM(CASE WHEN ps.step_type = 2 THEN COALESCE(ps.step_amount, 0) ELSE 0 END) AS rewindAmount FROM biz_process_step ps JOIN biz_original_roll r ON r.uuid = ps.original_uuid AND r.is_deleted = 0 WHERE ps.is_deleted = 0
GROUP BY ps.order_uuid ) step ON step.order_uuid = o.uuid LEFT JOIN (
) settle ON settle.order_uuid = o.uuid

choose.when:
SELECT d.dimensionKey, d.dimensionName, COUNT(DISTINCT d.order_uuid) AS orderCount, COUNT(*) AS originalRollCount, COALESCE(SUM(d.finishRollCount), 0) AS finishRollCount, COALESCE(SUM(d.originalWeight), 0) AS originalWeight, COALESCE(SUM(d.finishWeight), 0) AS finishWeight, COALESCE(SUM(d.lossWeight), 0) AS lossWeight, CASE WHEN COALESCE(SUM(d.originalWeight), 0) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE COALESCE(SUM(d.lossWeight), 0) / COALESCE(SUM(d.originalWeight), 0) * 100 END AS lossRatio, COALESCE(SUM(d.knifeCount), 0) AS knifeCount, COALESCE(SUM(d.sawAmount), 0) AS sawAmount, COALESCE(SUM(d.rewindAmount), 0) AS rewindAmount, COALESCE(SUM(d.processAmount), 0) AS processAmount, COALESCE(SUM(d.extraAmount), 0) AS extraAmount, COALESCE(SUM(d.totalAmount), 0) AS totalAmount, COALESCE(SUM(d.settled_amount), 0) AS settled_amount, COALESCE(SUM(d.pending_settle_amount), 0) AS pending_settle_amount, COALESCE(SUM(d.receivedAmount), 0) AS receivedAmount, COALESCE(SUM(d.cashReceivedAmount), 0) AS cashReceivedAmount, COALESCE(SUM(d.scrapOffsetAmount), 0) AS scrapOffsetAmount, COALESCE(SUM(d.unreceivedAmount), 0) AS unreceivedAmount FROM ( SELECT rb.*, CASE WHEN rb.orderAmountBase > 0 THEN rb.orderExtraAmount * rb.rollAmountBase / rb.orderAmountBase ELSE 0 END AS extraAmount, CASE WHEN rb.orderAmountBase > 0 THEN rb.orderTotalAmount * rb.rollAmountBase / rb.orderAmountBase ELSE 0 END AS totalAmount, CASE WHEN rb.orderAmountBase > 0 THEN rb.orderSettledAmount * rb.rollAmountBase / rb.orderAmountBase ELSE 0 END AS settled_amount, CASE WHEN rb.orderAmountBase > 0 THEN rb.orderPendingSettleAmount * rb.rollAmountBase / rb.orderAmountBase ELSE 0 END AS pending_settle_amount, CASE WHEN rb.orderAmountBase > 0 THEN rb.orderReceivedAmount * rb.rollAmountBase / rb.orderAmountBase ELSE 0 END AS receivedAmount, CASE WHEN rb.orderAmountBase > 0 THEN rb.orderCashReceivedAmount * rb.rollAmountBase / rb.orderAmountBase ELSE 0 END AS cashReceivedAmount, CASE WHEN rb.orderAmountBase > 0 THEN rb.orderScrapOffsetAmount * rb.rollAmountBase / rb.orderAmountBase ELSE 0 END AS scrapOffsetAmount, GREATEST( CASE WHEN rb.orderAmountBase > 0 THEN rb.orderSettledAmount * rb.rollAmountBase / rb.orderAmountBase ELSE 0 END - CASE WHEN rb.orderAmountBase > 0 THEN rb.orderReceivedAmount * rb.rollAmountBase / rb.orderAmountBase ELSE 0 END, 0 ) AS unreceivedAmount FROM ( SELECT r.uuid AS original_uuid, r.order_uuid,
r.paper_name AS dimensionKey, r.paper_name AS dimensionName,
COALESCE(r.machine_uuid, 'none') AS dimensionKey, COALESCE(m.machine_name, '未分配机台') AS dimensionName,
CASE WHEN r.process_mode = 3 THEN 'direct' WHEN r.main_step_type = 1 THEN 'saw' WHEN r.main_step_type = 2 THEN 'rewind' ELSE 'unset' END AS dimensionKey, CASE WHEN r.process_mode = 3 THEN '直发' WHEN r.main_step_type = 1 THEN '锯纸' WHEN r.main_step_type = 2 THEN '复卷' ELSE '未配置' END AS dimensionName,
COALESCE(r.actual_weight, r.total_weight, r.roll_weight, 0) AS originalWeight, COALESCE(r.total_loss_weight, 0) AS lossWeight, COALESCE(r.process_amount, 0) AS processAmount, CASE WHEN COALESCE(orderBase.orderProcessAmount, 0) > 0 THEN COALESCE(r.process_amount, 0) WHEN COALESCE(orderBase.orderOriginalWeight, 0) > 0 THEN COALESCE(r.actual_weight, r.total_weight, r.roll_weight, 0) WHEN COALESCE(orderBase.orderRollCount, 0) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS rollAmountBase, CASE WHEN COALESCE(orderBase.orderProcessAmount, 0) > 0 THEN COALESCE(orderBase.orderProcessAmount, 0) WHEN COALESCE(orderBase.orderOriginalWeight, 0) > 0 THEN COALESCE(orderBase.orderOriginalWeight, 0) ELSE COALESCE(orderBase.orderRollCount, 0) END AS orderAmountBase, COALESCE(o.total_extra_amount, 0) AS orderExtraAmount, COALESCE(settle.billedAmount, o.total_amount, 0) AS orderTotalAmount, COALESCE(settle.billedAmount, 0) AS orderSettledAmount, CASE WHEN settle.order_uuid IS NULL THEN COALESCE(o.total_amount, 0) ELSE 0 END AS orderPendingSettleAmount, COALESCE(settle.receivedAmount, 0) AS orderReceivedAmount, COALESCE(settle.cashReceivedAmount, 0) AS orderCashReceivedAmount, COALESCE(settle.scrapOffsetAmount, 0) AS orderScrapOffsetAmount, COALESCE(step.knifeCount, 0) AS knifeCount, COALESCE(step.sawAmount, 0) AS sawAmount, COALESCE(step.rewindAmount, 0) AS rewindAmount, COALESCE(fin.finishRollCount, 0) AS finishRollCount, COALESCE(fin.finishWeight, 0) AS finishWeight FROM biz_original_roll r JOIN biz_process_order o ON o.uuid = r.order_uuid LEFT JOIN sys_machine m ON m.uuid = r.machine_uuid LEFT JOIN ( SELECT order_uuid, COUNT(*) AS orderRollCount, SUM(COALESCE(actual_weight, total_weight, roll_weight, 0)) AS orderOriginalWeight, SUM(COALESCE(process_amount, 0)) AS orderProcessAmount FROM biz_original_roll WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND COALESCE(process_mode, 0) != 3 GROUP BY order_uuid ) orderBase ON orderBase.order_uuid = r.order_uuid LEFT JOIN (
) settle ON settle.order_uuid = r.order_uuid LEFT JOIN ( SELECT original_uuid, SUM(COALESCE(knife_count, 0)) AS knifeCount, SUM(CASE WHEN step_type = 1 THEN COALESCE(step_amount, 0) ELSE 0 END) AS sawAmount, SUM(CASE WHEN step_type = 2 THEN COALESCE(step_amount, 0) ELSE 0 END) AS rewindAmount FROM biz_process_step WHERE is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY original_uuid ) step ON step.original_uuid = r.uuid LEFT JOIN ( SELECT rel.original_uuid, COUNT(DISTINCT f.uuid) AS finishRollCount, SUM(COALESCE(rel.share_weight, f.actual_weight, f.estimate_weight, 0)) AS finishWeight FROM biz_finish_original_rel rel JOIN biz_finish_roll f ON f.uuid = rel.finish_uuid AND WHERE rel.is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY rel.original_uuid ) fin ON fin.original_uuid = r.uuid
r.is_deleted = 0 AND COALESCE(r.process_mode, 0) != 3 AND
) rb ) d GROUP BY d.dimensionKey, d.dimensionName ORDER BY totalAmount DESC, originalWeight DESC
choose.otherwise:
SELECT d.dimensionKey, d.dimensionName, COUNT(*) AS orderCount, COALESCE(SUM(orig.originalRollCount), 0) AS originalRollCount, COALESCE(SUM(fin.finishRollCount), 0) AS finishRollCount, COALESCE(SUM(orig.originalWeight), 0) AS originalWeight, COALESCE(SUM(fin.finishWeight), 0) AS finishWeight, COALESCE(SUM(orig.lossWeight), 0) AS lossWeight, CASE WHEN COALESCE(SUM(orig.originalWeight), 0) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE COALESCE(SUM(orig.lossWeight), 0) / COALESCE(SUM(orig.originalWeight), 0) * 100 END AS lossRatio, COALESCE(SUM(step.knifeCount), 0) AS knifeCount, COALESCE(SUM(step.sawAmount), 0) AS sawAmount, COALESCE(SUM(step.rewindAmount), 0) AS rewindAmount,
COALESCE(SUM(amountScope.scopedProcessAmount), 0) AS processAmount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN amountScope.orderAmountBase > 0 THEN COALESCE(o.total_extra_amount, 0) * amountScope.scopedAmountBase / amountScope.orderAmountBase ELSE 0 END), 0) AS extraAmount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN amountScope.orderAmountBase > 0 THEN COALESCE(settle.billedAmount, o.total_amount, 0) * amountScope.scopedAmountBase / amountScope.orderAmountBase ELSE 0 END), 0) AS totalAmount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN amountScope.orderAmountBase > 0 THEN COALESCE(settle.billedAmount, 0) * amountScope.scopedAmountBase / amountScope.orderAmountBase ELSE 0 END), 0) AS settled_amount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN settle.order_uuid IS NULL AND amountScope.orderAmountBase > 0 THEN COALESCE(o.total_amount, 0) * amountScope.scopedAmountBase / amountScope.orderAmountBase ELSE 0 END), 0) AS pending_settle_amount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN amountScope.orderAmountBase > 0 THEN COALESCE(settle.receivedAmount, 0) * amountScope.scopedAmountBase / amountScope.orderAmountBase ELSE 0 END), 0) AS receivedAmount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN amountScope.orderAmountBase > 0 THEN COALESCE(settle.cashReceivedAmount, 0) * amountScope.scopedAmountBase / amountScope.orderAmountBase ELSE 0 END), 0) AS cashReceivedAmount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN amountScope.orderAmountBase > 0 THEN COALESCE(settle.scrapOffsetAmount, 0) * amountScope.scopedAmountBase / amountScope.orderAmountBase ELSE 0 END), 0) AS scrapOffsetAmount, COALESCE(SUM(GREATEST( CASE WHEN amountScope.orderAmountBase > 0 THEN COALESCE(settle.billedAmount, 0) * amountScope.scopedAmountBase / amountScope.orderAmountBase ELSE 0 END - CASE WHEN amountScope.orderAmountBase > 0 THEN COALESCE(settle.receivedAmount, 0) * amountScope.scopedAmountBase / amountScope.orderAmountBase ELSE 0 END, 0)), 0) AS unreceivedAmount
COALESCE(SUM(o.total_process_amount), 0) AS processAmount, COALESCE(SUM(o.total_extra_amount), 0) AS extraAmount, COALESCE(SUM(COALESCE(settle.billedAmount, o.total_amount, 0)), 0) AS totalAmount, COALESCE(SUM(settle.billedAmount), 0) AS settled_amount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN settle.order_uuid IS NULL THEN COALESCE(o.total_amount, 0) ELSE 0 END), 0) AS pending_settle_amount, COALESCE(SUM(settle.receivedAmount), 0) AS receivedAmount, COALESCE(SUM(settle.cashReceivedAmount), 0) AS cashReceivedAmount, COALESCE(SUM(settle.scrapOffsetAmount), 0) AS scrapOffsetAmount, COALESCE(SUM(GREATEST(COALESCE(settle.billedAmount, 0) - COALESCE(settle.receivedAmount, 0), 0)), 0) AS unreceivedAmount
FROM biz_process_order o JOIN ( SELECT oi.uuid AS order_uuid,
DATE_FORMAT(COALESCE(oi.back_record_time, oi.order_date), '%Y-%m') AS dimensionKey, DATE_FORMAT(COALESCE(oi.back_record_time, oi.order_date), '%Y-%m') AS dimensionName
CAST(oi.is_invoice AS CHAR) AS dimensionKey, CASE WHEN oi.is_invoice = 1 THEN '开票' ELSE '不开票' END AS dimensionName
CAST(oi.settle_type AS CHAR) AS dimensionKey, CASE WHEN oi.settle_type = 1 THEN '次结' ELSE '月结' END AS dimensionName
CAST(oi.order_status AS CHAR) AS dimensionKey, CASE oi.order_status WHEN 0 THEN '草稿' WHEN 1 THEN '待下发' WHEN 2 THEN '加工中' WHEN 3 THEN '待回录' WHEN 4 THEN '已完成' WHEN 5 THEN '已结算' WHEN 6 THEN '已作废' ELSE CAST(oi.order_status AS CHAR) END AS dimensionName
oi.customer_uuid AS dimensionKey, oi.customer_name AS dimensionName
FROM biz_process_order oi WHERE oi.is_deleted = 0 ) d ON d.order_uuid = o.uuid LEFT JOIN ( SELECT r.order_uuid, COUNT(*) AS originalRollCount, SUM(COALESCE(r.actual_weight, r.total_weight, r.roll_weight, 0)) AS originalWeight, SUM(COALESCE(r.total_loss_weight, 0)) AS lossWeight FROM biz_original_roll r WHERE r.is_deleted = 0 AND COALESCE(r.process_mode, 0) != 3
GROUP BY r.order_uuid ) orig ON orig.order_uuid = o.uuid LEFT JOIN ( SELECT f.order_uuid, COUNT(*) AS finishRollCount, SUM(COALESCE(f.actual_weight, f.estimate_weight, 0)) AS finishWeight FROM biz_finish_roll f WHERE GROUP BY f.order_uuid ) fin ON fin.order_uuid = o.uuid LEFT JOIN ( SELECT ps.order_uuid, SUM(COALESCE(ps.knife_count, 0)) AS knifeCount, SUM(CASE WHEN ps.step_type = 1 THEN COALESCE(ps.step_amount, 0) ELSE 0 END) AS sawAmount, SUM(CASE WHEN ps.step_type = 2 THEN COALESCE(ps.step_amount, 0) ELSE 0 END) AS rewindAmount FROM biz_process_step ps JOIN biz_original_roll r ON r.uuid = ps.original_uuid AND r.is_deleted = 0 WHERE ps.is_deleted = 0
GROUP BY ps.order_uuid ) step ON step.order_uuid = o.uuid LEFT JOIN (
) settle ON settle.order_uuid = o.uuid
GROUP BY d.dimensionKey, d.dimensionName ORDER BY
d.dimensionKey ASC totalAmount DESC, originalWeight DESC

mapper.sql:
SELECT o.uuid AS orderUuid, o.order_no AS orderNo, o.order_date AS orderDate, DATE(COALESCE(o.back_record_time, o.order_date)) AS accountingDate, o.customer_name AS customerName, o.settle_type AS settleType, o.is_invoice AS isInvoice, o.order_status AS orderStatus, COALESCE(orig.originalRollCount, 0) AS originalRollCount, COALESCE(fin.finishRollCount, 0) AS finishRollCount, COALESCE(orig.paperSummary, '-') AS paperSummary, COALESCE(orig.processSummary, '-') AS processSummary, COALESCE(orig.originalWeight, 0) AS originalWeight, COALESCE(fin.finishWeight, 0) AS finishWeight, COALESCE(orig.lossWeight, 0) AS lossWeight, CASE WHEN COALESCE(orig.originalWeight, 0) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE COALESCE(orig.lossWeight, 0) / COALESCE(orig.originalWeight, 0) * 100 END AS lossRatio, COALESCE(step.knifeCount, 0) AS knifeCount, COALESCE(step.sawAmount, 0) AS sawAmount, COALESCE(step.rewindAmount, 0) AS rewindAmount,
COALESCE(amountScope.scopedProcessAmount, 0) AS processAmount, CASE WHEN amountScope.orderAmountBase > 0 THEN COALESCE(o.total_extra_amount, 0) * amountScope.scopedAmountBase / amountScope.orderAmountBase ELSE 0 END AS extraAmount, CASE WHEN amountScope.orderAmountBase > 0 THEN COALESCE(settle.billedAmount, o.total_amount, 0) * amountScope.scopedAmountBase / amountScope.orderAmountBase ELSE 0 END AS totalAmount, CASE WHEN amountScope.orderAmountBase > 0 THEN COALESCE(settle.billedAmount, 0) * amountScope.scopedAmountBase / amountScope.orderAmountBase ELSE 0 END AS settled_amount, CASE WHEN settle.order_uuid IS NULL AND amountScope.orderAmountBase > 0 THEN COALESCE(o.total_amount, 0) * amountScope.scopedAmountBase / amountScope.orderAmountBase ELSE 0 END AS pending_settle_amount, CASE WHEN amountScope.orderAmountBase > 0 THEN COALESCE(settle.receivedAmount, 0) * amountScope.scopedAmountBase / amountScope.orderAmountBase ELSE 0 END AS receivedAmount, CASE WHEN amountScope.orderAmountBase > 0 THEN COALESCE(settle.cashReceivedAmount, 0) * amountScope.scopedAmountBase / amountScope.orderAmountBase ELSE 0 END AS cashReceivedAmount, CASE WHEN amountScope.orderAmountBase > 0 THEN COALESCE(settle.scrapOffsetAmount, 0) * amountScope.scopedAmountBase / amountScope.orderAmountBase ELSE 0 END AS scrapOffsetAmount, GREATEST( CASE WHEN amountScope.orderAmountBase > 0 THEN COALESCE(settle.billedAmount, 0) * amountScope.scopedAmountBase / amountScope.orderAmountBase ELSE 0 END - CASE WHEN amountScope.orderAmountBase > 0 THEN COALESCE(settle.receivedAmount, 0) * amountScope.scopedAmountBase / amountScope.orderAmountBase ELSE 0 END, 0) AS unreceivedAmount
COALESCE(o.total_process_amount, 0) AS processAmount, COALESCE(o.total_extra_amount, 0) AS extraAmount, COALESCE(settle.billedAmount, o.total_amount, 0) AS totalAmount, COALESCE(settle.billedAmount, 0) AS settled_amount, CASE WHEN settle.order_uuid IS NULL THEN COALESCE(o.total_amount, 0) ELSE 0 END AS pending_settle_amount, COALESCE(settle.receivedAmount, 0) AS receivedAmount, COALESCE(settle.cashReceivedAmount, 0) AS cashReceivedAmount, COALESCE(settle.scrapOffsetAmount, 0) AS scrapOffsetAmount, GREATEST(COALESCE(settle.billedAmount, 0) - COALESCE(settle.receivedAmount, 0), 0) AS unreceivedAmount
FROM biz_process_order o LEFT JOIN ( SELECT r.order_uuid, COUNT(CASE WHEN COALESCE(r.process_mode, 0) != 3 THEN 1 END) AS originalRollCount, SUM(CASE WHEN COALESCE(r.process_mode, 0) != 3 THEN COALESCE(r.actual_weight, r.total_weight, r.roll_weight, 0) ELSE 0 END) AS originalWeight, SUM(CASE WHEN COALESCE(r.process_mode, 0) != 3 THEN COALESCE(r.total_loss_weight, 0) ELSE 0 END) AS lossWeight, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT CONCAT(r.paper_name, '/', r.gram_weight, 'g/', r.original_width, 'mm') ORDER BY r.paper_name SEPARATOR '；') AS paperSummary, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN r.process_mode = 3 THEN '直发' WHEN r.main_step_type = 1 THEN '锯纸' WHEN r.main_step_type = 2 THEN '复卷' ELSE '未配置' END ORDER BY r.main_step_type SEPARATOR '、') AS processSummary FROM biz_original_roll r WHERE r.is_deleted = 0
GROUP BY r.order_uuid ) orig ON orig.order_uuid = o.uuid LEFT JOIN ( SELECT f.order_uuid, COUNT(*) AS finishRollCount, SUM(COALESCE(f.actual_weight, f.estimate_weight, 0)) AS finishWeight FROM biz_finish_roll f WHERE
AND f.paper_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{q.paperName}, '%')
GROUP BY f.order_uuid ) fin ON fin.order_uuid = o.uuid LEFT JOIN ( SELECT ps.order_uuid, SUM(COALESCE(ps.knife_count, 0)) AS knifeCount, SUM(CASE WHEN ps.step_type = 1 THEN COALESCE(ps.step_amount, 0) ELSE 0 END) AS sawAmount, SUM(CASE WHEN ps.step_type = 2 THEN COALESCE(ps.step_amount, 0) ELSE 0 END) AS rewindAmount FROM biz_process_step ps JOIN biz_original_roll r ON r.uuid = ps.original_uuid AND r.is_deleted = 0 WHERE ps.is_deleted = 0
GROUP BY ps.order_uuid ) step ON step.order_uuid = o.uuid LEFT JOIN (
) settle ON settle.order_uuid = o.uuid
ORDER BY COALESCE(o.back_record_time, o.order_date) DESC, o.order_no DESC
